title: latouria forbesii
intro: Latouria forbesii, also known as the Indian spurge or woodspurge, is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its latex sap, which contains the compound ingenol mebutate, a potent anti-inflammatory and antitumor agent. The health benefits of Latouria forbesii include its ability to treat skin conditions, such as psoriasis and eczema, as well as its potential to inhibit cancer cell growth. In traditional herbal preparations, the latex sap is often extracted and used topically to treat various skin issues and may be incorporated into creams or ointments for its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
